zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，关注突破方向
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持窄幅整理，价格运行于2020美元上方，短线呈现震荡偏强结构。20日均线位于2000.84附近，现价保持其上方，说明中期多头仍具一定优势，但上涨动能尚未完全释放。

MACD指标处于负值区域，显示市场仍存在一定空头压力，短线反弹力度偏弱。不过价格未出现明显回落，说明下方承接较强。RSI数据暂缺，当前需重点观察成交量与后续动能变化，以确认趋势延续性。

技术面来看，2018美元附近形成首要支撑，若失守则可能进一步测试2000美元整数关口。上方阻力集中于2026至2035美元区域，一旦有效突破，行情有望打开新的上升空间，并向2050美元附近延伸。

操作策略方面，激进交易者可关注2020美元附近低吸机会，止损设于2000美元下方。稳健投资者则建议等待突破2030美元后顺势跟进。当前市场波动有限，避免高杠杆追单，宜采取分批建仓与严格风控策略。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 2023.22, holding slightly above the 20-day moving average at 2000.84, which suggests the broader short-term structure remains cautiously bullish. Price action has been relatively compressed between 2018 and 2026, indicating consolidation after recent selling pressure. The modest 24-hour gain of 0.15% reflects a balanced market where buyers are attempting to stabilize momentum, although upside conviction remains limited unless ETH can secure a stronger breakout above nearby resistance levels.

The MACD reading at -9.70 points to lingering bearish momentum beneath the surface, even as price trades above the moving average. This divergence often signals weakening downward pressure rather than a confirmed reversal. RSI data is unavailable, but the narrow trading range suggests momentum conditions are likely neutral rather than overbought or oversold. If MACD begins to flatten and cross upward in coming sessions, traders could interpret that as an early sign of renewed bullish participation entering the market.

Immediate support appears near 2018, which aligns closely with the session low and psychological short-term demand. A breakdown beneath this zone could expose Ethereum to further downside toward the 2000 area, where the SMA(20) may act as secondary support. On the upside, resistance is forming around 2026-2035. A decisive move above that range could trigger short-covering activity and potentially open a path toward the 2050 region, especially if broader crypto sentiment improves simultaneously.

From a trading perspective, short-term traders may prefer waiting for confirmation before entering aggressive positions. Bullish setups become more attractive on sustained closes above resistance with improving momentum indicators. Conservative traders could consider buying near support with tight risk management below 2000. Meanwhile, bearish traders may remain cautious unless Ethereum loses its moving-average support decisively. Given the current consolidation structure, breakout strategies are likely more effective than range-chasing until clearer directional momentum emerges.
